title: Saved by the Ice Cold Prince's Embrace Manga Gets Light Anime in July
content: The Nippan Group's digital publisher Funguild announced on Wednesday that Hokuhoku Yakiimo and Kusabi Kurokawa's Saved by the Ice Cold Prince's Embrace (Migawari Reijō o Sukutta no wa Reikoku Mujihi na Kōri no Ōji no Ai Deshita or literally, What Saved the Stand-In for the Aristocratic Daughter Was the Cold-Hearted,…
author: ANN

title: 'Love Live! Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club' Gets TV Anime in January 2027
content: The official X (formerly Twitter) account for the Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club ( Hasunosora Girls' High School Idol Club ) project announced a television anime on Tuesday, scheduled to premiere in January 2027. The Love Live!
author: MyAnimeList

title: An Umamusume X Midori no Makibao Collaboration Is Underway
content: An Uma Musume: Pretty Derby and Midori no Makibao collaboration event is now underway. As part of the event, the collab’s PR team has released a crossover video of the two franchises.
author: Anime Corner

title: Every Episode of My Hero Academia: Vigilantes Season 2, Ranked
content: My Hero Academia: Vigilantes Season 2 is officially over, and the second chapter of the spinoff is a bit of a mixed bag. It gets off to a slower start, with its earliest installments fluctuating in quality.
author: ComicBook

title: Netflix Reveals One Piece Season 2 Is Lagging Behind Season 1
content: One Piece Season 2 sees a significant drop in viewership compared to Season 1, as recently reported by Netflix itself. The highly anticipated sequel to the live-action adaptation of the series, widely known for breaking the curse of poor live-action adaptations, arrived on March 10, 2026, and has received no shortage…
author: ComicBook

title: Golden Kamuy Anime's Final Arc Continues in Winter With 'Runaway Train' Climax
content: The official website for the anime of Satoru Noda 's Golden Kamuy manga revealed on Monday that the television anime's final arc will continue with the climactic "Runaway Train" arc this winter. The staff unveiled a visual: The final arc lists a mostly returning cast and staff.
author: ANN

title: My Hero Academia’s Replacements Ends Its Latest Season With the Perfect Sendoff for Its Hero
content: My Hero Academia anime came out in the Fall of last year; however, the franchise continued its run into Winter 2026 with a perfect replacement: the prequel Vigilantes . My Hero Academia: Vigilantes Season 2 began airing in Winter 2026, and after a total of 13 episodes, the anime has come to an end as well.
author: ComicBook

title: Dark Horse Licenses The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom Artbook
content: Dark Horse Comics announced on Tuesday that it has licensed The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom—Secrets of the Zonai hardcover artbook, based on Nintendo 's The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom , for release in English on October 20.
author: ANN

title: Every Anime Coming to Netflix in April 2026
content: After an exciting first quarter, the Spring 2026 anime season is finally here, and Netflix returns with another lineup of exciting series. Usually, Crunchyroll streams most of the new series each quarter, but Netflix has its own range of unique and exclusive shows for fans across the globe.
author: ComicBook

title: 5 New AnimeJapan 2026 Announcements to Be Excited For (Ranked By Hype Level)
content: AnimeJapan 2026 took place in Japan this past weekend, and with the event has revealed some major new anime announcements and updates that fans need to keep an eye out for. With a new wave of anime coming our way soon as part of the Spring 2026 anime schedule, it was far from the only thing to be excited about.
author: ComicBook
